summary: Phase 3 testing complete — all features verified and working correctly. Backend webhook integration fires successfully (returns expected 410 while Make scenario is inactive), user experience unaffected. Research section, Trust section, footer socials, and updated waitlist microcopy all present and correct. Mobile responsiveness verified on 390x844 and 360x740 viewports.
passed_tests: Backend: All 24 API tests passed (health, root, count, waitlist CRUD, consent, personalization, edge cases, webhook URL leak prevention)
Backend: Webhook fires after successful signup with correct payload {registeredAt, email}
Backend: Webhook failure (410) does NOT break user response — user receives success despite Make.com returning 410 (CRITICAL requirement met)
Backend: Webhook URL never exposed in any API response (tested GET /api, /api/health, /api/waitlist/count, POST /api/waitlist)
Backend: GET /api/waitlist/count increments correctly after successful signup
Frontend: Section order correct — Hero, Problem, Research, Solution, Features, Personalization, MiniDemo, Trust, Waitlist, FAQ

Frontend: Research section — heading 'Rereading feels safe. Retrieval proves what you know.', stat cards (61%, 40%, ≈50%), citations (Roediger & Karpicke 2006, PSPI), bridge card mentions feedback loop, disclaimer present

Frontend: Trust section — all 6 cards present (Secure authentication, Protected user data, Secrets stay server-side, Bot & spam protection, Secure deployment, Privacy-first waitlist), 5 checklist items

Frontend: Footer socials — X link (https://x.com/teachbackdev, @teachbackdev) and Instagram link (https://www.instagram.com/teachback.dev/, @teachback.dev) with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'
Frontend: Waitlist microcopy — 'No spam. Just product updates and early access news from updates@teachback.dev' with mailto link
Frontend: Copy verification — no forbidden phrases ('50% better grades', '50% higher grades', 'guarantee', 'trusted by thousands'), all required phrases present
Frontend: Mobile 390x844 — no horizontal scroll (scrollWidth=390, clientWidth=390), stat cards stack, trust cards stack, checklist items stack, consent checkbox 16x16px tap target
Frontend: Mobile 360x740 — no horizontal scroll (scrollWidth=360, clientWidth=360), trust card titles readable, footer socials wrap cleanly
Frontend: End-to-end flow — email submission → 'Joining…' loading state → success message 'You're on the list...' → button shows 'On the list' → count increments by 1

Integration: Webhook logs verified — 'Waitlist signup: phase3-e2e-1780021369@teachback.test' → 'HTTP Request: POST https://hook.us2.make.com/...' → 'Make webhook sync FAILED... status 410' → user still received success

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all sections, content, mobile responsiveness, end-to-end flow verified)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (webhook fires correctly, user experience unaffected by 410)
